subject: docs(claude-md): adopt code standards from external glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Reviewed shared patterns from devmade-ai/glow-props CLAUDE.md and adopted
applicable standards for SyncTone. Adds concrete guardrails that were missing:
code size limits, cleanup rules, quality checks, UX non-negotiables, and
explicit prohibitions. Creates AI_MISTAKES.md for cross-session learning.

Tags: documentation, process, standards
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_015k2GpGFjd1jBUcBAGSZotu
